meta.title: GymAI Club — AI-Powered Fitness Coach
meta.description: GymAI Club analyzes your movement in real time through your camera, corrects your form and builds workout plans made just for you. No equipment, no gym — just you and your AI coach.

hero.lead: GymAI Club analyzes your movement in real time through your camera, corrects your form and builds workout plans made just for you. No equipment, no gym — just you and your AI coach.

features.heading: Everything a pocket coach can do

camera.title: Invisible AI Camera
camera.desc: Your camera feed stays clean — no skeleton overlay. The AI analyzes your movement in the background, counts your reps and instantly calls out cues like "Keep your back straight!" the moment your form slips.

plans.title: Personal Plans
plans.desc: Enter your goal, level and any injury notes — the AI generates a weekly program made just for you.

community.title: Community & Leaderboard
community.desc: Stay motivated with a weekly leaderboard podium, a friends feed and unlockable badges.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.desc: Measure every rep and every calorie with your streak, calendar and daily summaries.

chat.title: AI Chat Coach
chat.desc: Ask your AI coach anything about nutrition and training, and get an instant answer.

showcase.heading: A look inside
showcase.sub: Real app screens — swipe to explore.

slides.title: Home
slides.desc: Water tracking, calories, daily activity, your active plan and your streak — all on one screen. Your AI coach is one tap away.

slides.title: Workout Plans
slides.desc: Build your own plan or pick a goal and let the AI craft it. Ready-made templates from beginner to pro.

slides.title: Exercise Library
slides.desc: 18 exercises with target muscles and difficulty levels. Start with the AI camera in a single tap.

slides.title: Profile
slides.desc: Follow your weekly program, check off your days and watch your progress. Every plan is made for you.

slides.title: Smart Camera
slides.desc: Your AI camera analyzes your movement in real time, counts your reps and corrects your form on the spot.

steps.title: Pick your goal
steps.desc: Fat loss, strength or core — set your goal and level, and let the AI build your plan.

steps.title: Open the camera
steps.desc: Set your phone in front of you. The AI analyzes your movement, counts reps and corrects your form.

steps.title: Track your progress
steps.desc: Keep your streak, earn badges and claim your spot in the community. Every workout rewards you.

cta.title: Your AI coach is waiting.
cta.sub: Download today and finish your first workout with AI.

items.q: How does the AI camera work?
items.a: Your phone camera analyzes your movement in real time. There's no skeleton overlay on screen — just a clean camera feed and a rep counter. When your form slips, you get an audio and visual cue.

items.q: Do I need a gym membership or equipment?
items.a: No. GymAI Club focuses on bodyweight exercises. Equipment-based moves are available too, but all you need to start is your phone.
Camera analysis runs on your device; your footage is never uploaded to a server. Only your workout stats are stored in your account.
Core features are free. Premium unlocks advanced AI plans, unlimited camera analysis and exclusive badges.

footer.tagline: The AI-powered biomechanics fitness club. Read your form, push past your limits.
